Identification.LongTitle: An Act to amend the Criminal Code (murder of an intimate partner, one's own child or an intimate partner's child)
Identification.RunningHead: An Act to amend the Criminal Code (murder of an intimate partner, one's own child or an intimate partner's child)

Provision.Text: The enactment amends the Criminal Code to classify the murder of an intimate partner, one's own child or an intimate partner's child as first degree murder.
His Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows:

Section.Text: Section 231 of the Criminal Code is amended by adding the following after subsection (4):

Subsection.MarginalNote: Murder â intimate partner or child
Subsection.Text: Irrespective of whether a murder is planned and deliberate on the part of a person, murder is first degree murder when the victim is the personâs intimate partner, the personâs own child or the child of the personâs intimate partner.
